title: All Vanilla Missing Potions
description: More potions, based on all existing effects, that don't have their own potions in vanilla
body:
### Adds many potions, based on existing effects without own potions:
Haste, mining fatigue, nausea, resistance, blindness, hunger, wither, health boost, absorption, saturation, glowing, levitation, conduit power, dolphin's grace, hero of the village, darkness (each has 2-3 potions: usual, long and some - enhanced).
### Effects without long lasting potions:
Infested, oozing, weaving, wind charged.
### And some useful custom effects.
### There are ingredients and their potions:
- Glow Berries -> Potion of Health Boost -> Potion of Wither
- Golden Apple -> Potion of Absorption -> Potion of Wither
- Carved Pumpkin -> Potion of Blindness -> Potion of Glowing
- Sculk Catalyst -> Potion of Darkness -> Potion of Glowing
- Prismarine Shard -> Potion of Dolphin's Grace -> Potion of Conduit Power
- Amethyst Shard -> Potion of Haste -> Potion of Mining Fatigue
- Pumpkin Pie -> Potion of Saturation -> Potion of Hunger
- Armadillo Scute -> Potion of Resistance
- Emerald Block -> Potion of Hero of The Village
- Rotten Flesh -> Potion of Nausea
